mapper.select: select id, dict_type, dict_label, dict_value, sort_no, education_scopes from sys_dict_item where dict_type = #{dictType} and enabled = 1 order by sort_no, id

select count(*) from sys_dict_item where dict_type = #{dictType} and enabled = 1
and (dict_label like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or dict_value like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
select id, dict_type, dict_label, dict_value, sort_no, education_scopes from sys_dict_item order by dict_type, sort_no, id
select id, dict_type, dict_label, dict_value, sort_no, education_scopes from sys_dict_item where id = #{id} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_dict_item (dict_type, dict_label, dict_value, sort_no, enabled, education_scopes) values (#{dictType}, #{dictLabel}, #{dictValue}, #{sortNo}, 1, #{educationScopes})
mapper.select: select count(*) from youth_info where deleted = 0 and ethnicity = #{dictValue}
select count(*) from youth_info where deleted = 0 and political_status = #{dictValue}

select (select count(*) from youth_info where deleted = 0 and education_level = #{dictValue}) + (select count(*) from job_post where deleted = 0 and education_requirement = #{dictValue}) + (select count(*) from job_post_education_rel rel join job_post j on j.id = rel.job_post_id where j.deleted = 0 and rel.education_code = #{dictValue})
select count(*) from youth_info where deleted = 0 and degree_code = #{dictValue}
select count(*) from youth_info where deleted = 0 and gender = #{dictValue}
select count(*) from enterprise_info where deleted = 0 and enterprise_scale = #{dictValue}
select count(*) from enterprise_info where deleted = 0 and enterprise_nature = #{dictValue}
select count(*) from enterprise_info where deleted = 0 and industry = #{dictValue}
select count(*) from job_post where deleted = 0 and experience_requirement = #{dictValue}
select count(*) from job_post where deleted = 0 and salary_range = #{dictValue}
